prediction.reasoning: AMT (American Tower) is a REIT with relatively stable price movements. Using historical volatility analysis, AMT typically exhibits daily price changes of 1-3%. The point estimate assumes minimal drift with slight upward bias due to REIT dividend yield support. Confidence intervals are based on approximately 1.5% daily standard deviation, scaled by appropriate z-scores (0.67, 1.28, 1.65 for 50%, 80%, 90% respectively).
